title: Unified hard bank (local hard tasks + official SWE ranking items)
description: One suite, one average: local hard discrimination tasks plus SWE-bench Verified instances. External ids use prefix swebench: and are scored by the official Docker evaluator (resolved=100, not_resolved=0). Evaluator infrastructure failures are excluded from the mean, not counted as model zeros. Same command as any other suite: run-suite --suite unified-hard.
